title: Smoky Chowder
description: A hearty and flavorful soup made with smoky flavors and fluffy textures. Perfect for a cold winter's day.

ingredients.name: Smoky Chowder Mix
ingredients.notes: available at most Canadian grocery stores

instructions: In a large pot, heat the flaxseed oil over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1 minute.
Add the diced potatoes, vegetable broth, and smoky chowder mix.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 15-20 minutes.
Serve the chowder hot, topped with fluffy bread and a sprinkle of flaxseed oil.
Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
